summary: Building a premium black-and-gold themed website for Luminia Group Conglomerate. Features a cinematic welcome popup with gold particle effects, logo reveal animation, and 'Enter' button. Main page shows 7 company cards. Each company has a 'Launching Soon' modal with relevant imagery. Companies: Luminia Gadgets (watches/headphones/earbuds), Moda Vestra (fashion/clothing), Velocity Vogue (luggage), Luminia Captures (photography/weddings), Assured Tours & Travels (travel/tickets), Luminia TechLabs (web/app dev), GST Service (tax/business services).
architectural_notes: Black and gold is the site-wide color theme
Logo: gold crown/compass emblem on deep black with 'LUMINIA GROUP CONGLOMERATE' in gold lettering
7 companies: Luminia Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue, Luminia Captures, Assured Tours & Travels, Luminia TechLabs, GST Service
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Gold luxury smartwatch with dark background, elegant product shot (luminia-gadgets-watch.dim_600x400.png)
- Premium over-ear headphones in gold and black tones, studio product shot (luminia-gadgets-headphones.dim_600x400.png)
- Luxury wireless earbuds in gold case on dark background (luminia-gadgets-earbuds.dim_600x400.png)
- High-fashion women's clothing flatlay in black and gold tones (moda-vestra-fashion.dim_600x400.png)
- Premium hard-shell luggage set in gold and black on dark background (velocity-vogue-luggage.dim_600x400.png)
- Elegant wedding couple portrait with cinematic gold lighting (luminia-captures-wedding.dim_600x400.png)
- Professional photoshoot setup with gold backdrop and studio lights (luminia-captures-studio.dim_600x400.png)
- Luxury airplane interior first class seat with gold accents (assured-tours-flight.dim_600x400.png)
- Scenic train journey through mountains with warm golden hour light (assured-tours-train.dim_600x400.png)
- Modern laptop showing code editor with dark theme and gold UI accents (luminia-techlabs-dev.dim_600x400.png)
- GST tax document and calculator on a dark desk with gold pen (gst-service-tax.dim_600x400.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a full-screen cinematic welcome popup shown once per session. It must feature: an animated gold particle shimmer/rain effect on deep black background; the Luminia Group logo (image-3.png) fading in at center with a golden glow pulse animation; 'WELCOME TO LUMINIA GROUP CONGLOMERATE' in gold serif capitals with a letter-by-letter reveal animation; a self-drawing thin gold horizontal divider line below the headline; subtitle text 'A Legacy of Excellence' in smaller italic gold below the divider; a glowing gold 'ENTER' button with ripple effect; and a gold burst/dissolve exit transition when the user clicks Enter.

Build the main landing page with a consistent black and gold luxury theme throughout — background obsidian/deep black, all typography in gold or ivory, gold accent lines and dividers. Use the Luminia Group logo (image-3.png) in the navigation bar and footer with a black background behind it.

Display all 7 Luminia subsidiaries as premium gold-bordered cards on the main page in a responsive grid. Each card must show the company name, a fitting tagline, and a gold 'Discover' button. Companies and their domains: (1) Luminia Gadgets — watches, headphones, earbuds; (2) Moda Vestra — fashion and clothing; (3) Velocity Vogue — luggage and travel bags; (4) Luminia Captures — wedding photography and professional photoshoots; (5) Assured Tours & Travels — itineraries, train tickets, flight tickets; (6) Luminia TechLabs — web and app development, GST services; (7) GST Service — GST-related tax and business services.

When a user clicks the 'Discover' button on any subsidiary card, open a full-screen or large modal overlay with a 'Launching Soon' experience. The modal must have: a black background with animated gold border; the subsidiary name in large gold text; 'LAUNCHING SOON' with a shimmer/glow animation; a grid or carousel of relevant imagery for that subsidiary (using the generated images); and a close button in gold.
Use all generated product/service images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in the respective 'Launching Soon' modals for each subsidiary.

new_feature_requests.summary: Cinematic welcome popup with gold particle effects, logo reveal, and animated 'Welcome to Luminia Group Conglomerate' text with Enter button
Main page with 7 company cards in black and gold theme
Launching Soon modals for each company with relevant product/service images in black and gold styling
Logo with black and golden background applied site-wide
